providerConfigName.description: The Crossplane ProviderConfig name for GitHub.

repositories.description: Map of GitHub repositories keyed by repository name.

existing.description: Whether the repository already exists in GitHub and should be adopted by external name instead of being created.

read.description: GitHub team slugs that should have pull access to the repository, for example @Patina-Network/read-only.

write.description: GitHub team slugs that should have push access to the repository, for example @Patina-Network/codebloom.
